rules.name: secret_credential_added
rules.label: Secret or credential-like value added
required_followup_checks: Remove secret-like values and use sanitized placeholders or environment variable names.

rules.name: auth_bypass_or_weakening
rules.label: Auth/session/access control may be weakened
required_followup_checks: Restore access-control checks and test unauthorized access.

rules.name: auth_session_change
rules.label: Auth/session/access control changed
required_followup_checks: Check login, logout, session expiry, roles, and unauthorized access paths.

rules.name: api_contract_change
rules.label: API contract or endpoint behavior changed
required_followup_checks: Verify endpoint path, HTTP method, request fields, response fields, and status handling.

rules.name: destructive_or_bulk_operation
rules.label: Destructive or bulk operation changed
required_followup_checks: Require backup, rollback plan, and limited sanitized test sample.

rules.name: database_schema_or_persistence
rules.label: Database/schema/persistence changed
required_followup_checks: Review migration safety, rollback notes, and data-impact scope.

rules.name: external_write_or_file_transfer
rules.label: External write, email, webhook, or file transfer changed
required_followup_checks: Use dry-run/test mode where available and validate outbound payloads.

rules.name: validation_or_error_handling_weakened
rules.label: Validation or error handling may be weakened
required_followup_checks: Restore validation/error handling and test failure paths.

rules.name: dependency_config_deploy_file
rules.label: Dependency, config, or deployment file changed
required_followup_checks: Verify config/deploy/dependency impact and rollback plan if production-facing.
